rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee statements in component type scopes for port-level contracts
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings
Declare constants and equations in component type scopes for visible symbol access
Avoid referencing AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Component type contracts should use visible port names and feature references
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Implementation-level subcomponent paths in type contracts
